retrieved_result: A Vision For Collaborative Technologies. This page discusses collaborative technologies and collaboration tools rather than IDEs or software development environments.
Decision_Reason: The page focuses on collaborative technologies rather than integrated development environments (IDEs) or software development tools, so it is not relevant to top IDEs for software development.
